executives.name: Tim Gitzel
executives.background: Tim Gitzel is the President and Chief Executive Officer of Cameco. He has more than 30 years of experience in the mining industry. Prior to joining Cameco in 2007, he was executive vice-president, mining business unit for AREVA in Paris, France. He has also served as president and CEO of AREVA's Canadian subsidiary.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice-President and Chief Operating Officer
Director, President and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Grant Isaac
executives.background: Grant Isaac is the Executive Vice-President and Chief Financial Officer. He joined Cameco in 2009. Before joining Cameco, he was the Dean of the Edwards School of Business at the University of Saskatchewan.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice-President and Chief Financial Officer
Senior Vice-President, Corporate Strategy and Chief Risk Officer

executives.name: Brian Reilly
executives.background: Brian Reilly is the Senior Vice-President and Chief Operating Officer. He joined Cameco in 2011. He previously served as President of Cameco Resources and Managing Director of Cameco Australia.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice-President and Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: Alice Wong
executives.background: Alice Wong is the Senior Vice-President and Chief Corporate Officer. She has been with Cameco since 1987 and has held various leadership roles in corporate responsibility, investor relations, and corporate communications.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice-President and Chief Corporate Officer

executives.name: Sean Quinn
executives.background: Sean Quinn is the Senior Vice-President, Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary. He joined Cameco in 1993 and has held various legal positions within the company.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice-President, Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary

executives.name: Catherine Gignac
executives.background: Catherine Gignac is a corporate director with more than 30 years of experience in capital markets and the mining industry as a mining equity research analyst and geologist.

executives.name: Christopher Lewis
executives.background: Mr. Lewis is a geologist with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry, specifically in uranium exploration and development. He has been involved with GoviEx since its early stages and has led the exploration teams in Niger and Zambia.

executives.name: Cliff Revering
executives.background: Mr. Revering is a Professional Geoscientist with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry, with a focus on uranium exploration and development. He previously held senior roles at Cameco Corporation and SRK Consulting.

executives.name: Daniel Camus
executives.background: Daniel Camus is the former Group CFO and Head of Strategy and International Activities of Electricité de France (EDF). He has significant experience in the global energy sector.

executives.name: Dominique Minière
executives.background: Dominique Minière is the former President of Nuclear and Chief Strategy Officer at Ontario Power Generation. He has extensive experience in nuclear operations.

executives.name: Donald Kayne
executives.background: Donald Kayne is the President and CEO of Canfor Corporation and CEO of Canfor Pulp Products Inc. He has over 40 years of experience in the forest products industry.

executives.name: Ian Bruce
executives.background: Ian Bruce is the Chair of the Board. He is the former President and CEO of Peters & Co. Limited, an investment firm. He has extensive experience in investment banking and the oil and gas industry.

executives.name: Kathryn Jackson
executives.background: Kathryn Jackson is the former Senior Vice-President and Chief Technology Officer of RTI International Metals, Inc. She has a PhD in Engineering and Public Policy.

executives.name: Kevin Himbeault
executives.background: Mr. Himbeault is the Vice President, Operations and Regulatory Affairs. He has over 25 years of experience in the mining industry, with a focus on environmental management, regulatory compliance, and operations in the uranium sector.

executives.name: Peter Kukielski
executives.background: Mr. Kukielski was appointed President and Chief Executive Officer of Hudbay in 2019. He has more than 30 years of experience in the mining industry. Previously, he was Executive Chairman of Waratah Resources Limited and President and CEO of Nevsun Resources Ltd. He also served as Chief Executive of ArcelorMittal Mining and held executive positions at Teck Resources and Falconbridge.

executives.name: Scott Melbye
executives.background: Mr. Melbye is a 40-year veteran of the nuclear energy industry having held leadership positions in major uranium mining companies. He is also the Executive Vice President of Uranium Energy Corp. and has served as President of the Uranium Producers of America.

board_of_directors.name: Ian Bruce
board_of_directors.background: Ian Bruce is the Chair of the Board. He is the former President and CEO of Peters & Co. Limited, an investment firm. He has extensive experience in the capital markets and the oil and gas industry.
committees: Nominating, Corporate Governance and Risk Committee

board_of_directors.name: Daniel Camus
board_of_directors.background: Daniel Camus is the former Group CFO and Head of Strategy and International Activities of Electricité de France (EDF). He has significant experience in the global energy sector.

board_of_directors.name: Donald Kayne
board_of_directors.background: Donald Kayne is the President and CEO of Canfor Corporation and CEO of Canfor Pulp Products Inc. He has over 40 years of experience in the forest products industry.
committees: Nominating, Corporate Governance and Risk Committee

board_of_directors.name: Dominique Minière
board_of_directors.background: Dominique Minière is the former President of Nuclear at Ontario Power Generation and former Senior Executive Vice-President at EDF. He has extensive nuclear industry expertise.
committees: Safety, Health, Environment, Sustainability and Technical Committee

board_of_directors.name: Catherine Gignac
board_of_directors.background: Catherine Gignac is a corporate director with more than 30 years of experience in capital markets and the mining industry as a mining equity research analyst and geologist.
committees: Nominating, Corporate Governance and Risk Committee

board_of_directors.name: Tim Gitzel
board_of_directors.background: Tim Gitzel is the President and CEO of Cameco. He is the only management director on the board.

tenure_dates.title: Director, President and Chief Executive Officer

board_of_directors.name: Kathryn Jackson
board_of_directors.background: Kathryn Jackson is the former Senior Vice-President and Chief Technology Officer of RTI International Metals, Inc. She has a PhD in Engineering and Public Policy.

board_of_directors.name: Peter Kukielski
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Kukielski was appointed President and Chief Executive Officer of Hudbay in 2019. He has more than 30 years of experience in the mining industry. Previously, he was Executive Chairman of Waratah Resources Limited and President and CEO of Nevsun Resources Ltd. He also served as Chief Executive of ArcelorMittal Mining and held executive positions at Teck Resources and Falconbridge.
